textByHashes.c19935c5f46f1d76780e3e74dc5fdf0918df610c: Oh no... what do I do?
textByHashes.a2830e73f1c1596a80c7fd7950b761963ce59306: I'm supposed to be cooking a cake for the Cake Off but my prized tin has broken!
textByHashes.600ddb5de163213be3a9e8a128998f6d43c25ac8: Oh, you don't know about the Great Gielinor Cake Off? It's Party Pete's newest idea!
textByHashes.337706fae9cf17aef0e8ffe84af7d0f93d59f2f4: He's invited representatives from across the world to have their baking skills judged.
textByHashes.332cecd8b957697416c378279a4aede356c9cfe4: Oh! I'm Patty Seer, a wandering cook! I'm traveling the world learning everything I can about food.
textByHashes.8ef003ae15e7f7d5243debdecfc932bb3f7677bc: Yes, I use it for every cake I bake. It brings me luck.
textByHashes.c6defc4766fde8f5fa78ef01fc6f18db27ae7dd1: I'm not sure how, but it's broken in two... Do you think you might be able to help me?
textByHashes.4902572139638047e763270b91e862e1709e1dd0: Oh... thank you for the offer but I'm not interested in that.
